source: Crown (authored from setting — no stat block PDF source)
note: Crown adversaries scale by sway — the political/criminal clout of the opposing force. threat_level 1-4 maps to sway: low/notable/powerful/apex.

1.name: Crown Infantryman
1.description: A conscript in the colors. Following orders, not thinking too hard.

1.name: Street Informant
1.description: Someone who sells information to whoever pays fastest.

1.name: Crew Thug
1.description: A low-ranking member looking to prove themselves.
1.weakness: better offer, fear, isolated from crew

1.name: Dunweld Beast (Small)
1.description: A creature from beyond the Dunweld boundary. Smaller than the ones you've heard about.

1.name: Corrupt Tax Collector
1.description: The bureaucratic face of Crown extraction. Has a ledger and a grudge.
1.weakness: political favor, competing official, audit threat

2.name: Crown Officer
2.description: A commissioned officer with a patrol of six and a set of standing orders.

2.name: Rival Crew Lieutenant
2.description: Second in command with something to prove and a short fuse.
2.weakness: crew leader leverage, rival gang alliance, public exposure

2.name: Crown Inquisitor
2.description: An agent of the Crown with authority to question, detain, and search.
2.weakness: political protection, noble rank, jurisdictional gaps

2.name: Dunweld Stalker
2.description: A territorial creature from the deep Dunweld. Has followed something back.
2.weakness: fire, iron weapons, breaking line of sight

2.name: Noble House Agent
2.description: Discreet, well-connected, and working an agenda that intersects yours.
2.weakness: exposing their house, counter-leverage, Crown interference

3.name: Crown Garrison Commander
3.description: Commands the district garrison. Has the ear of the Regent.
3.weakness: Regent-level political intervention, major scandal, rival commander

3.name: Criminal Mastermind
3.description: A crew leader who has been playing this game for twenty years. You are not the first threat.
3.weakness: inner circle betrayal, losing the street, Crown exposure

3.name: Dunweld Apex Predator
3.description: A thing from beyond the boundary that should not have gotten through.
3.weakness: the boundary seal ritual, specialized hunting party, iron and salt

3.name: Named NPC: The Magistrate
3.description: The legal face of Crown power in this city. Has files on everyone.
3.weakness: evidence of corruption, noble house leverage, Regent-level favor

4.name: The Regent's Hand
4.description: A direct agent of the Regent with unlimited authority and no accountability.
4.weakness: the Regent herself, proof of treason against Crown, foreign diplomatic intervention

4.name: Named NPC: The Kingmaker
4.description: A noble whose ambition extends to the throne. Has been preparing for years.
4.weakness: the current Regent, proof of the conspiracy, internal noble betrayal
